LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAITNIFF GREGORY ELARMS. NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST IS BASED ON THE PLAINTIFF'S DEATH IN 2021. AS THERE ARE NO REMAINING PLAINTIFFS AND NO SURVIVAL ACTION, THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED IN ITS ENTIRETY AND FUTURE COURT DATES VACATED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING ON THE MANDATORY FORM. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: PARK. (301/RCE)

Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: Motion For Withdrawal Of Attorney Of Record As To Plaitniff Gregory Elarms.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's counsel's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is granted. The request is based on the plaintiff's death in 2021. As there are no remaining plaintiffs and no survival action, this matter is dismissed in its entirety and future court dates vacated.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order on the required Judicial Council form.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)
